instruction: Describe what component of the software is affected using professional language.
input: Inappropriate implementation in in Permission prompts in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 109.0.5414.74 allowed a remote attacker to force acceptance of a permission prompt via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)
output: The component affected is the permission prompt handling mechanism within Google Chrome's user interface on Windows operating systems, which failed to correctly validate user interactions.
